'''thatasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubbuboo|hubbuboo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubbuboo|hubbuboo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thatasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thætæsæth|thætæsæth]] || [[word:thætæsæj|thætæsæj]] || [[word:thætæsæsh|thætæsæsh]] || [[word:thætæsæ|thætæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatatasath|thatatasath]] || [[word:thatatasaj|thatatasaj]] || [[word:thatatasash|thatatasash]] || [[word:thatatasa|thatatasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatasath|thatasath]] || [[word:thatasaj|thatasaj]] || [[word:thatasash|thatasash]] || [[word:thatasa|thatasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafsath|thatafsath]] || [[word:thatafsaj|thatafsaj]] || [[word:thatafsash|thatafsash]] || [[word:thatafsaf|thatafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thatasatha|thatasatha]] || [[word:thatasaja|thatasaja]] || [[word:thatasasha|thatasasha]] || [[word:thatasaka|thatasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thatasath|thatasath]] || [[word:thatasaj|thatasaj]] || [[word:thatasash|thatasash]] || [[word:thatasa|thatasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thatasathal|thatasathal]] || [[word:thatasajal|thatasajal]] || [[word:thatasashal|thatasashal]] || [[word:thatasakal|thatasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thatasathatha|thatasathatha]] || [[word:thatasajaja|thatasajaja]] || [[word:thatasashasha|thatasashasha]] || [[word:thatasaka|thatasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thatasathan|thatasathan]] || [[word:thatasajan|thatasajan]] || [[word:thatasashan|thatasashan]] || [[word:thatasakan|thatasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thatasathaoro|thatasathaoro]] || [[word:thatasajaoro|thatasajaoro]] || [[word:thatasashaoro|thatasashaoro]] || [[word:thatasakaoro|thatasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
